prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Boxes, fittings & fill, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: box fill exceeded (calculable from photo!). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: NEC 314.16, 300.14, 314.28 (pull box sizing).
title: Compliance check: Boxes, fittings & fill (residential job)
